name: Sorala Daughter of Toria
concept: Esrolian scribe, scholar, and sorcerer of Lhankor Mhy
family: Daughter of Toria, a sage of Lhankor Mhy. Granddaughter of a Lhankor Mhy sage at the Nochet Knowledge Temple. Father aided the House of Sartar against Lunar assassins.
backgroundEvents: Supported usurper Samastina in the Esrolian civil war. Protected Samastina from Red Earth assassins. Blessed by the Earth Queen during the siege of Nochet. Fought at the Battle of Pennel Ford. Accompanied Argrath White Bull to Pavis.

equipment.name: Letter of introduction from Knowledge Temple in Nochet
Small stone figurine (crested dragonewt) containing Find Magic matrix
500 L in coin, jewels, and booty

notes: Sorcery Spells: Logician 55% (3 pts, +2/point), Reveal Rune 55% (2 pts, +1/point), Solace of the Logical Mind 15% (2 pts, +1/point). Find Magic matrix (small stone figurine): costs 1 Rune Point, finds magic within Rune spell range unless shielded by 3m+ of soil/stone. Noted sage specializing in the Second Age, particularly Old Pavis and Auld Wyrmish writings.
background: Sorala is an adventurous and athletic scholar, wearing a traditional bejeweled veil concealing her lower jaw. She is the granddaughter of a Lhankor Mhy sage at the Nochet Knowledge Temple. Her father aided the House of Sartar against Lunar assassins and died with great glory when Belintar raised the Building Wall. Her mother Toria, also a sage of Lhankor Mhy, survived the Lion King's Feast but died with great glory during Greymane's Great Raid. After apprenticeship, Sorala was initiated into the Lhankor Mhy cult. In the Esrolian civil war she supported the usurper Samastina, and fought to protect her from Red Earth assassins. During the siege of Nochet, she was blessed by the Earth Queen and fought with distinction at the Battle of Pennel Ford. She accompanied Argrath White Bull to Pavis and acclaimed him as King of Pavis, befriending Vasana and Yanioth there.
